seoArticle.title: Business automation with AI in Seville: the complete guide
seoArticle.intro: Business automation with artificial intelligence has gone from a futuristic option to a competitive necessity for SMEs in Seville and across Andalusia. At Ordinaly, we help local companies implement AI agents for business that radically transform their daily operations.

section1.title: What are AI agents and how do they benefit your business in Seville?
section1.body: AI agents are intelligent systems designed to perform specific tasks autonomously. Unlike simple chatbots, these agents can make decisions, learn from previous interactions, and execute complex workflows without human intervention. For a real estate company in Seville, this means managing customer inquiries 24/7, scheduling visits automatically, and generating property descriptions in seconds.

section2.title: Industries that benefit most from AI automation in Andalusia
section2.body: Our experience working with Andalusian businesses has shown that certain sectors gain immediate benefits:

list.0: Property managers: Incident automation, community communications, and vendor management. A manager in Seville can save up to 20 hours per week with our systems.
list.1: Real estate agencies: Conversational agents that qualify leads, schedule visits, and automatically send property information. Ideal for Seville agencies handling dozens of listings at once.
list.2: Marketing agencies: Automation of social media posts, AI-powered content generation, and campaign analytics. Seville agencies working with us manage 3x more clients with the same team.
list.3: Retail commerce: Intelligent inventory management, demand forecasting, and automated customer support via WhatsApp Business.

section3.title: AI training for companies: the essential complement
section3.body: We don't just implement technology: we train your team to be self-sufficient. Our artificial intelligence courses in Seville are 100% practical and focused on real use cases. From introductory ChatGPT to advanced automations with Make and Zapier, we tailor training to your sector's specific needs.

section4.title: Why choose Ordinaly to automate your business in Seville?
section4.body: We're software engineers specialized in AI with a physical headquarters in Seville. This sets us apart from international consultancies that apply generic solutions:

list.0: Knowledge of the local market: We understand the nuances of Andalusian SMEs
list.1: In-person availability: Face-to-face meetings at our downtown Seville office
list.2: 100% tailored solutions: We don't use templates. Every project is designed specifically for you
list.3: Training included: Your team learns to manage and improve the systems we implement
list.4: Ongoing support: We don't disappear after implementation

cta.title: Ready to make the leap to business automation?

chatDemo.title: AI that talks like your business
chatDemo.subtitle: See how our AI assistant handles real customer interactions across different industries.

0.text: Hi! Is the apartment at Calle Sierpes 12 still available? I'd love to schedule a visit this Saturday.

1.text: Hello! Yes, it's available. We have slots at 10:00 and 12:00 on Saturday. Which works best for you?

2.text: 12:00 would be perfect. My name is María García.

3.text: Done, María! Visit confirmed for Saturday at 12:00. A confirmation has been sent to your email. See you then! 🏠

0.text: Hi, I ordered a laptop 3 days ago but I haven't received any tracking info. Order #8821.

1.text: Hi! I found your order #8821. It shipped yesterday and is estimated to arrive tomorrow between 9:00–13:00. 📦

2.text: Great! Can I change the delivery address?

3.text: Of course! I've updated the delivery address. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly. Anything else I can help with? ✉️

0.text: Hello! I'd like to book a table for 4 people this Friday at 9pm. Do you have availability?

1.text: Hi! We have a table available at 21:00 on Friday. Could I get your name and phone number to confirm the reservation?

2.text: Carlos Martín, 600123456. Any set menu for groups?

3.text: Perfect, Carlos! Table reserved for 4 at 21:00 on Friday. We do have a group menu at €35/person including drinks. 🍽️

0.text: Good morning! I need help with a tenant who hasn't paid rent in 2 months. What are my options?

1.text: Good morning! I understand. The first step is a formal written notice to the tenant. Would you like us to schedule a call with one of our lawyers?

2.text: Yes, preferably this week. I'm available Tuesday or Thursday afternoon.

3.text: Done! I've scheduled a call for Thursday at 17:00 with Atty. Rodríguez. A confirmation has been sent to your email. ⚖️

faq.title: FAQ de nuestra agencia de automatización IA
faq.subtitle: Resolvemos tus dudas sobre la agencia de automatización en inteligencia artificial líder

0.q: ¿Qué soluciones ofrece una agencia de automatización IA para mi negocio?
0.a: Como agencia de automatización IA, implementamos sistemas autónomos que gestionan consultas, procesan documentos y optimizan flujos de trabajo sin intervención humana.
0.extra: Esto permite a las empresas reducir errores y garantizar una disponibilidad 24/7, escalando la operativa de forma inmediata.

1.q: ¿Cuál es el coste de contratar una agencia de automatización IA?
1.a: En nuestra agencia de automatización IA, adaptamos los presupuestos a la complejidad del proyecto.
1.extra: Ofrecemos soluciones accesibles para PYMEs, desde integraciones básicas hasta ecosistemas complejos. La mayoría de nuestros clientes logran el ROI en menos de 6 meses gracias al ahorro de recursos.

2.q: ¿Es necesario tener perfil técnico para trabajar con una agencia de automatización IA?
2.a: No. Nuestra agencia de automatización IA diseña herramientas intuitivas que no requieren conocimientos de programación.
2.extra: Además, impartimos formación práctica en IA para que tu equipo domine las soluciones implementadas con total autonomía.

3.q: ¿Qué nos define como tu agencia de automatización IA de referencia?
3.a: Somos una agencia de automatización en inteligencia artificial que rechaza las soluciones genéricas.
3.extra: Nos especializamos en sectores críticos (inmobiliaria, finanzas, marketing) para ofrecer estrategias personalizadas que realmente impulsan la competitividad nacional de tu empresa.

4.q: ¿Qué plazos de entrega maneja nuestra agencia de automatización IA?
4.a: Como tu agencia de automatización IA, trabajamos por fases para ofrecer resultados rápidos.
4.extra: Las automatizaciones básicas están listas en 2-4 semanas, mientras que integraciones complejas de ERP como Odoo suelen completarse en un plazo de 1 a 3 meses.

5.q: ¿Ofrece vuestra agencia de automatización IA soporte continuo?
5.a: Sí. Como agencia de automatización IA comprometida con tu éxito, incluimos mantenimiento técnico y soporte post-implementación.
5.extra: Nuestras soluciones son escalables, permitiendo que la tecnología crezca al mismo ritmo que tu negocio en toda España.

enrollment.title: Course enrollment
enrollment.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to enroll in this course?
enrollment.bonificationQuestion: Does your company have training credits?
enrollment.bonificationHint: If this training is eligible, you can continue from the corresponding link.
enrollment.bonificationMissingLink: We couldn't find the bonified course link. Please contact support.
enrollment.bonificationInfo:
Some of our trainings may be subsidized via FUNDAE/SEPE and/or fit into co‑funded calls by FSE+ and PRTR‑NextGenerationEU, provided your company meets requirements and processes the aid.

FUNDAE / SEPE – Company‑funded training: allows part of the training cost to be offset in Social Security contributions. Official info for companies (FUNDAE) and training for employees (SEPE).

EU Funds – FSE+ 2021‑2027: national and regional programs (including Andalusia) financing employment, education, and training through public calls. See UAFSE.

PRTR – NextGenerationEU (Component 23): measures for upskilling and active employment policies; coverage depends on each call. Official info from the Recovery Plan and SEPE.

Andalusia (regional scope): FSE+ Andalusia 2021‑2027 and Vocational Training for Employment (FPE) publish specific grants/calls. See Junta de Andalucía and FPE.

Notice: Eligibility, intensity, and compatibility vary by regulation and current calls. Ordinaly provides course documentation but does not apply for or process subsidies on the client's behalf. Always review official links before contracting.
enrollment.paymentNote: Payment processing will be handled in the next step.

formation.introduction: At Ordinaly, we offer specialized training in emerging technologies and professional development. Our courses are designed to boost your professional career with up-to-date content and innovative methodologies.
formation.bonificationDisclaimer: Some of our training courses may be eligible for funding through FUNDAE/SEPE and/or fit into co-financed calls by FSE+ and PRTR-NextGenerationEU, as long as your company meets the requirements and processes the aid. Ordinaly provides the course documentation but does not request or process bonuses or grants on behalf of the client. Always check the official links before contracting.

bonificationTexts.summary: Some of our training may be subsidized via FUNDAE/SEPE or fit into calls co-financed by FSE+ and PRTR-NextGenerationEU, provided your company meets requirements and processes the aid independently.
bonificationTexts.details:
**FUNDAE / SEPE - Company-sponsored training:** allows part of the training cost to be subsidized through Social Security contributions. Official info for Companies ([FUNDAE](https://www.fundae.es/empresas)) and Training for employees ([SEPE](https://www.sepe.es/HomeSepe/empresas/informacion-para-empresas/formacion-para-ocupados.html)).

**EU Funds - FSE+ 2021-2027:** national and regional programs (including Andalusia) that finance employment, education, and training actions through public calls. See [UAFSE](https://www.mites.gob.es/UAFSE/es/FSE21_27/programas/index.htm).

**PRTR - NextGenerationEU (Component 23):** measures for training and active employment policies; coverage depends on each call. Official info from the [Recovery Plan](https://planderecuperacion.gob.es/politicas_y_componentes/componente-23-nuevas-politicas-publicas-para-un-mercado-de-trabajo-dinamico-resiliente-e-inclusivo) and [SEPE](https://www.sepe.es/HomeSepe/empresas/informacion-para-empresas/formacion-para-ocupados.html).

**Andalusia (regional):** FSE+ Andalusia 2021-2027 and Vocational Training for Employment (FPE) publish specific grants/calls. See [Junta de Andalucía](https://www.juntadeandalucia.es/organismos/economiahaciendayfondoseuropeos/areas/fondos-europeos-andalucia/normativa-programacion/programacion/programacion-2021-2027/paginas/europeos-social-2021-2027.html) and [FPE](https://www.juntadeandalucia.es/temas/trabajar/formacion/fpe.html).

**Notice:** Eligibility, intensity, and compatibility of funding vary by regulations and current calls. Ordinaly provides course documentation but does not apply for or process subsidies or grants on behalf of the client. Always check official links before contracting.

hero.title: We automate with purpose
hero.subtitle: A multidisciplinary team building AI + automation that keeps humans in control and businesses moving faster.
hero.definition: Ordinaly Software S.L. is an AI-powered business automation company based in Seville, Spain, building agents, chatbots, and workflows for SMBs and enterprise teams.

mission.title: Augment people, not replace them
mission.body: We design automations that remove friction so teams can focus on creativity, decisions, and relationships.

vision.title: Automation everyone can trust
vision.body: Make intelligent workflows simple, transparent, and measurable for companies of any size.

story.title: How Ordinaly grew from Seville to automate ambitious teams
story.lead: A founder-led automation and AI studio born in Andalucía to replace repetitive work with measurable impact for fast-moving businesses.

1.title: Summer 2025 · Idea ignition at the University of Seville
1.body: While wrapping up his Computer Engineering degree, Antonio teams up with Emilio and Guillermo to design Ordinaly: an automation studio built to free teams from repetitive tasks and keep humans in control.

2.title: Summer 2025 · Brand, business model, and our promise
2.body: During the Sevillian summer we shaped the company, sharpened the business model, and crafted the brand around a clear promise: AI-powered workflows that deliver ROI fast.

3.title: September 2025 · Company incorporated and first clients
3.body: We officially launch Ordinaly, start working with our first customers, and deliver pilots while Antonio pursues his Master's in Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence.

4.title: 2026 · Scaling automation for more companies
4.body: We double down on helping more organizations automate their processes, eliminate repetitive tasks, and prove the value of AI with real business outcomes.

formation.label: Training
formation.title: Business AI Courses
formation.subtitle: We train teams to be autonomous with AI, creating a recurring revenue stream and a direct adoption channel.

0.title: AI for Business Teams
0.description: Hands-on training for non-technical teams to integrate AI tools into their daily workflows, with real industry exercises.

1.title: Process Automation with AI
1.description: Intensive program on designing and deploying AI agents and automations to reduce repetitive tasks and scale operations.

2.title: Digital Transformation Strategy
2.description: Executive course for leaders who want to define an automation and AI roadmap tailored to their company and industry.

chatbots-empresas-sevilla.title: Chatbots for businesses in Seville
chatbots-empresas-sevilla.subtitle: 24/7 support that understands your processes and answers with your data.
chatbots-empresas-sevilla.description: We build chatbots trained on your knowledge base, connected to your CRM/ERP, ready to deflect repetitive tickets.

valueProps.0: Answers with your data: products, shipping, incidents.
valueProps.1: WhatsApp, web and email integration in under 2 weeks.
valueProps.2: Handoff to humans with full CRM context.

outcomes.1: +12 CSAT points thanks to real-time order status

steps.0: Audit FAQs and current support flows
steps.1: Connect sources (FAQ, manuals, CRM) and channels (web/WhatsApp)
steps.2: 2-week pilot with deflection and CSAT targets

0.q: Which channels can I deploy to?
0.a: Web, WhatsApp Business, Facebook Messenger and email. Start with one channel and extend after the pilot.

1.a: RAG with validated sources and confidence thresholds; if unsure, the bot routes to a human with captured context.

2.q: Can you integrate with my CRM?
2.a: Yes, Odoo, HubSpot or your CRM via API to read orders/customers and create tickets.

automatizacion-n8n-sevilla.title: n8n automation in Seville
automatizacion-n8n-sevilla.subtitle: Robust n8n workflows for operations and support without lock-in.
automatizacion-n8n-sevilla.description: We design and operate your n8n flows: data syncs, alerts, reconciliations and repetitive tasks you still do by hand.

valueProps.0: Reusable blueprints for sales, support and ops.
valueProps.1: Monitoring and alerts so you never lose data again.
valueProps.2: Governance: version control and secure credentials.

steps.1: Build flows in n8n with logs and retries
steps.2: Train your team and leave a control panel

0.q: Do you work on-prem or cloud?
0.a: We can deploy n8n in your infra or manage it in our EU cloud.

1.a: ERP/CRM (Odoo, HubSpot), spreadsheets, SQL DBs, webhooks and internal APIs.

2.a: Flow tests, retries, alerts and success metrics per flow.

agentes-ia-atencion-cliente-sevilla.title: AI agents for customer support in Seville
agentes-ia-atencion-cliente-sevilla.subtitle: Autonomous agents that solve issues and execute actions in your systems.
agentes-ia-atencion-cliente-sevilla.description: We build agents that can check orders, restock, create tickets or escalate to humans when needed, with full traceability.

valueProps.0: Secure actions with permissions and validations.
valueProps.1: Logs and traces for auditing every decision.

steps.0: Define policies and limits for each agent
steps.2: Run controlled pilot with quality metrics

0.q: Can they act in my systems?
0.a: Yes, with permissions and validations. Service accounts and full action logging.

1.a: Human review first weeks, automatic scoring and alerts on low confidence.

2.a: We pick the model per case (OpenAI, Claude, etc.) and can route by cost/latency.

automatizacion-whatsapp-business-sevilla.title: WhatsApp Business automation in Seville
automatizacion-whatsapp-business-sevilla.subtitle: Sales and support on WhatsApp with bots, smart routing and clear metrics.
automatizacion-whatsapp-business-sevilla.description: We implement WhatsApp Business flows: acquisition, lead scoring, auto-replies and handoff to sales with full context.

valueProps.0: Hybrid bots: buttons + AI for open questions.
valueProps.1: CRM integration to log every conversation.
valueProps.2: Routing by schedule and agent skill.

outcomes.2: Weekly sales and support report by channel

steps.2: Train the team and track conversion

0.q: Do you use the official API?
0.a: Yes, official WhatsApp Business API (BSP) and we can work with your current provider.

1.a: Dashboards with leads, response times and sales attributed to WhatsApp.

2.q: Can it coexist with web chatbots?
2.a: Yes, we reuse knowledge and flows between web and WhatsApp for consistency.

formacion-ia-pymes-sevilla.title: AI training for SMBs in Seville
formacion-ia-pymes-sevilla.subtitle: Hands-on programs for sales, ops and support teams.
formacion-ia-pymes-sevilla.description: Custom trainings with your real cases: effective prompts, light automations and data safety.

valueProps.0: Short modules (2-4h) with exercises on your processes.
valueProps.1: Templates and checklists ready to use next day.

0.q: Do you cover security and privacy?
0.a: Yes, safe-use policies, data handling and approved tools.

1.a: Yes, on-site in Seville or remote with hands-on dynamics.

2.a: Guides, prompts and checklists tailored to your processes.

integraciones-crm-erp-sevilla.title: CRM/ERP integrations (Odoo, HubSpot) in Seville
integraciones-crm-erp-sevilla.subtitle: Consistent data across sales, support and ops with robust integrations.
integraciones-crm-erp-sevilla.description: We sync contacts, deals, orders and inventory between your systems (Odoo, HubSpot, internal bases) with validations and logs.

valueProps.0: Clear mappings: which system wins each field.

0.a: HubSpot, Odoo and custom CRMs via API. Others evaluated on request.

1.a: Logs with retries and alerts; reconciliation rules defined with your team.

2.a: Secure tokens, least privilege, encrypted in transit. Optional VPN or private network.
